message:
test(oracle): add 24 conformance tests (s171-s194) covering joins, subqueries, CTEs, aggregates

New tests: outer join NULL propagation, indexed queries, CASE variants,
scalar subquery in SELECT list, mixed type comparison, LIMIT/OFFSET,
typeof/affinity, recursive CTE fibonacci, aggregate on empty table,
DISTINCT+ORDER, three-way join, upsert, hex/zeroblob/quote,
abs/sign/minmax, date/time functions, expression-only SELECT, ALTER
TABLE ADD COLUMN, UPDATE/DELETE with subquery, LIKE/GLOB, CTE
variations, triggers, views, instr/substr/replace, GROUP_CONCAT.
501 oracle pass, 0 fail, 1 ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
